steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The clause before the blank states that the Comac ARJ21 is far more aerodynamic, signalling that the following clause will give additional support or evidence for that claim.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
“In fact,” adds emphasis and presents the lift‑to‑drag ratio as further proof of greater aerodynamics.
The other three choices either introduce contrast (Nevertheless, However) or signal a conclusion (In conclusion), which does not match the additive relationship.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
